column1: # These domains are NEVER forwarded to upstream resolvers.
# Supported types and their value formats:
#   NS     → name server FQDN                         e.g.  ns1.example.com.
#   TXT    → text; separate multiple strings with |   e.g.  v=spf1 ~all
#   SRV    → "priority weight port target"            e.g.  10 20 443 svc.example.com.
#   SOA    → "mname rname serial refresh retry expire minimum"
# Example: resolve api.mycompany.com to internal address inside your network
